title: Zerfoo ML Inference Engine for Go
shortDescription: Production-grade ML inference for transformer models — embedded in Go applications, no CGo required.
longDescription:
Zerfoo is a high-performance ML inference and training framework written entirely in Go. Deploy large language models (Llama 3, Gemma 3, Mistral, Qwen 2, Phi 3/4, DeepSeek V3) directly in your Go services without Python dependencies or CGo build complexity.

Key capabilities:
- OpenAI-compatible REST API with SSE streaming
- GGUF model format (llama.cpp compatible)
- GPU acceleration via CUDA, ROCm, and OpenCL — loaded at runtime, no special build required
- Quantized inference: Q4_K_M, Q8_0, FP16, BF16
- KV caching, speculative decoding, continuous batching
- Prometheus metrics, structured logging, health checks
- Embeddable as a Go library: import github.com/zerfoo/zerfoo

Performance: Gemma 3 1B Q4_K_M at 234 tok/s decode, exceeding Ollama by 14%.
highlights: Go-native, zero CGo by default — go build ./... compiles everywhere
OpenAI-compatible API — drop-in replacement for existing integrations
Competitive with C++ runtimes — 234 tok/s on Gemma 3 1B Q4_K_M

pricingDimensions.name: Tokens Processed
pricingDimensions.description: Total number of input + output tokens processed.

pricingDimensions.name: GPU Hours
pricingDimensions.description: GPU compute hours consumed by inference tasks.

deploymentOptions.description: SaaS deployment on ECS Fargate with ALB and autoscaling via the provided CloudFormation template.

containerImage.description: Pre-built container image available in AWS Marketplace ECR.
